title: Youtube Starter Kit
description: A modpack for Minecraft content creators, enhancing survival with client-side mods for better visuals, performance, and quality of life. Ideal for recording and streaming high-quality videos.
body:
Youtube Starter Kit is a modpack designed for content creators looking to enhance their Minecraft survival experience. This carefully selected collection of client-side mods focuses on improving visual appeal, performance, and quality of life, ensuring top-notch content creation. With advanced camera controls, HUD customization, enhanced graphics, and smoother animations, this modpack provides the essential tools for recording and streaming high-quality Minecraft videos. Elevate your content and captivate your audience with Youtube Starter Kit!

![High FPS while recording Replay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9517ac28b5be9708e9d4cbdc3d0e434884f67e82.png)
You get High FPS while recording Replay on High Render Distance

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Note: I did not create any of these mods. Full credit goes to the mod developers. If you want your mod to be removed, or for any issues/errors, please join the Discord.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
